---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a problem to help us improve Birthday Video AI
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: dragongCode
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 126, Safari 17]
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- **App Version / Commit:** [e.g. v0.3.2 or commit hash]
- **Account Tier:** [e.g. Free / Pro]

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (blocks core feature)
- [ ] High (major feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature works but has issue)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic / minor)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here — logs, network traces, related issues, etc.
